custom_css: header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:0 1px 0 #0056b3,0 2px 0 #004494,0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5)!important;position:relative!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important;z-index:10!important;overflow:hidden!important;padding-right:35px!important}header .title-3d::before{content:''!important;position:absolute!important;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.8), transparent)!important;animation:rastro-logo 2s linear infinite!important;z-index:1!important;pointer-events:none!important}@keyframes rastro-logo{0%{left:-100%}50%{left:100%}100%{left:100%}}header .title-3d::after{content:''!important;width:25px!important;height:35px!important;background-image:url('https://i.ibb.co/MyQb8Z6n/0986e1154bddd027ba0fdf5e242e30c3.jpg')!important;background-size:contain!important;background-repeat:no-repeat!important;background-position:center!important;display:inline-block!important;position:absolute!important;right:0!important;z-index:2!important}header button{background:#00a859!important;border:2px solid #fbdf07!important;border-radius:10px!important;color:#fff!important;position:relative!important;z-index:20!important}aside .btn-pulse{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00a859,#fbdf07)!important;color:#000!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:12px!important;position:relative!important;overflow:hidden!important}aside .btn-pulse:active{animation:vibra-gol 0.1s infinite!important}aside .btn-pulse::after{content:''!important;position:absolute!important;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, transparent, transparent 5px, rgba(255,255,255,0.2) 5px, rgba(255,255,255,0.2) 10px);opacity:0;transition:0.1s}aside .btn-pulse:active::after{opacity:1!important}@keyframes vibra-gol{0%{transform:translate(2px,1px)}50%{transform:translate(-2px,-1px)}100%{transform:translate(0,0)}}#streak-input{background:#111!important;border:1px solid #fbdf07!important;color:#fff!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#00a859!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:#fbdf07!important;height:4px!important}
